text: Lipopeptides - the colourful palette of fascinating bio-molecules Lipopeptides constitute a wide-ranging group of fascinating bio-molecules used in numerous fields of biomedicine. The growing interest in these bio-molecules is connected to their usage as antibiotic and antifungal agents, in immunotherapeutic approaches and personal care. These many-fold applications find their justification in the unique structure of lipopeptides.
